calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2018 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-27-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Compel Verification Of Discovery Response, Production Of Documents, Supplemental Responses To Interrogatories And Requests For Admissions
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF III-INTERACTIVE LLC DBA DIVISION D's Motion To Compel Verification Of Discovery Response, Production Of Documents, Supplemental Responses To Interrogatories And Requests For Admissions.

Plaintiff III-Interactive, LLC's motion to compel verification of discovery response, production of documents, supplemental responses to interrogatories and requests for admissions is off calendar as moot and its requests for monetary sanctions is denied. Per the report of Judge Pro Tem David McDonald, defendant Zephyr Digital, Inc. has now provided all the discovery that was sought to be compelled. The court adopts in full the recommendation and reasons for that recommendation in the report of Judge Pro Tem David McDonald as to plaintiff's request for monetary sanctions.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Verification Of Discovery Response, Production Of Documents, Supplemental Responses To Interrogatories And Requests For Admissions
Off Calendar Jun-21-2018 Continued To Jul-17-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Peter N. Hadiaris of the law offices of Bradshaw & Associates (415-433-4800) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Matthew R. Harrison of the law offices of Bloom Charter Law Associates (415-890-3422) appears as counsel for defendant/opposing party

Plaintiff does not stipulate to judge pro tem.

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides.

PLAINTIFF III-INTERACTIVE LLC'S Motion To Compel Verification Of Discovery Response, Production Of Documents, Supplemental Responses To Interrogatories And Requests For Admissions is CONTINUED to JUL-17-2018 at 9:30 AM in Law and Motion, Department 302. Further notice is waived.

Judge Pro Tem: David R. McDonald; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (DISC302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-10-2018 Set For Trial On Sep-24-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-09-2018 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling:

DEFENDANT ZEPHYER DIGITAL INC.'s DEMURRER to the second cause of action for breach of contract in the complaint filed by III-Interactive LLC is overruled. The breach of contract claim is adequately alleged. If Zephyr needs further information about the terms of the alleged contract, it can obtain that information in discovery.

ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-09-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling:

DEFENDANT ZEPHYER DIGITAL INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE the request for attorney's fees in the complaint filed by III-Interactive LLC is denied. Given that recovery of fees doesn't become an issue until judgment is entered, the request for fees is adequately alleged. If Zephyr needs further information about the ground(s) for the alleged entitlement to fees, it can obtain that information in discovery.

ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.
